final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system for a tech dashboard and mobile interface, featuring cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: flat vector UI design system, classic minimal tech aesthetic, clean geometric forms, Apple HIG meets Material Design 3
Subject: dashboard layout with data visualization cards, mobile interface screens, button components, toggle switches, input fields, dropdown menus
Composition: modular grid system, scalable components, responsive breakpoints shown, organized spacing hierarchy
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as primary background, electric blue or cyan as accent, soft white for text, subtle gray scale for secondary elements
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, subtle glassmorphism on cards, crisp vector edges, no noise or grain
Constraints: must scale from mobile to desktop; components must be reusable; minimum 8px grid system; dark mode first
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; drop shadows over 8px blur; more than 3 accent colors; gradients unless subtle; generic corporate blue; cluttered layouts
